zh.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart是Ranulf de Briquessart和Various Mothers的女兒，於大約1075年出生在法國諾門迪。她於1090年與Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1095年12月13日在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯享年21歲，埋葬在英國爾。

zh-hans.Gamlingay, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾加姆林蓋
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart是Ranulf de Briquessart和Various Mothers的女儿，于大约1075年出生在法国諾門迪。她于1090年与Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1095年12月13日在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯享年21岁，埋葬在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Helga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse female personal name, a derivative of the adjective heilagr ‘prosperous, successful’ (from heill ‘hale, hearty, happy’). It was introduced to England before the Conquest, but did not survive long. It has been reintroduced to the English-speaking world in the 20th century from Scandinavia and Germany. See also Olga .

variants.name: Hella
meanings: From an Old Norse female personal name, a derivative of the adjective heilagr ‘prosperous, successful’ (from heill ‘hale, hearty, happy’). It was introduced to England before the Conquest, but did not survive long. It has been reintroduced to the English-speaking world in the 20th century from Scandinavia and Germany. See also Olga .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart was born about 1075, in Normandy, France as the daughter of Ranulf de Briquessart and Various Mothers. She married Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom in 1090, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 December 1095, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, at the age of 21, and was buried in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart est née environ 1075, à Normandie, France, fille de Ranulf de Briquessart et Various Mothers. Elle a épousé Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom en 1090, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 décembre 1095, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 21 ans, et a été enterrée à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart wurde um 1075 in Normandie, Frankreich, als Tochter von Ranulf de Briquessart und Various Mothers geboren. Sie hat 1090 in England Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Dezember 1095 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England und wurde in Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart è nata il circa 1075 nel Normandie, Francia come figlia di Ranulf de Briquessart e Various Mothers. Lei sposato Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom nel 1090, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 dicembre 1095, nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, all'età di 21 anni, e fu sepolta a Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessartは約1075年にフランスノーマンディでRanulf de BriquessartとVarious Mothersの娘として生まれた。1090年にイギリスでSiward fitzDunning Lord of Lathomと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1095年12月13日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで21歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart(은)는 대략 1075년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Ranulf de Briquessart(와)과 Various Mothers의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1090년 영국에서 Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1095년 12월 13일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 21세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Lathom, Lancashire, England: Lathom, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart nasceu aproximadamente 1075, em Normandie, França filha de Ranulf de Briquessart e Various Mothers. Ela casou-se com Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom em 1090, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1095, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 21 anos, e foi sepultada em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart родилась около 1075 г. в местности норманди, Франция. Её родителей звали Ranulf de Briquessart и Various Mothers. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom в 1090 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 декабря 1095 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 21 год и была похоронена в местности чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Helga de Briquessart nació aproximadamente 1075, en Normandie, Francia como hija de Ranulf de Briquessart y Various Mothers. Se casó con Siward fitzDunning Lord of Lathom en 1090, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1095, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 21 años, y fue sepultada en Cheshire, Inglaterra.
